Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
import os
d = os.path.expanduser\('~/Desktop/appstore_screenshots'\)
for i in range\(1, 6\):
    for f in os.listdir\(d\):
        if f.startswith\(f'ss{i}'\):
            path = os.path.join\(d, f\)
            img = Image.open\(path\)
            img = img.resize\(\(1284, 2778\), Image.LANCZOS\)
            img.save\(path\)
            print\(f'{f}: resized to 1284x2778'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
import os
d = os.path.expanduser\('~/Desktop/appstore_screenshots'\)
os.makedirs\(d + '/ipad', exist_ok=True\)
for i in range\(1, 6\):
    for f in os.listdir\(d\):
        if f.startswith\(f'ss{i}'\) and f.endswith\('.png'\):
            img = Image.open\(os.path.join\(d, f\)\)
            img = img.resize\(\(2048, 2732\), Image.LANCZOS\)
            img.save\(os.path.join\(d, 'ipad', f\)\)
            print\(f'iPad: {f} resized to 2048x2732'\)
")
